cast.name: 爱德华多·佩谢 Edoardo Pesce
皮耶尔·乔治·贝洛奇奥 Pier Giorgio Bellocchio

writer.name: Alessio De Leonardis Alessio De Leonardis

director.name: Alessio De Leonardis Alessio De Leonardis

introduction: In the heart of Italy, Marino Bruni, a devoted father and diligent workshop owner, cherishes his time with his daughter Claudia on Tuesdays and Fridays post-divorce from Simona. However, when confronted with a daunting 50,000-euro tax burden, Marino's world is turned upside down as he is forced to shutter his cherished workshop, scrambling to secure a stable living situation for Claudia's visits. In a moment of desperation, he reluctantly accepts a proposition to serve as the getaway driver for a notorious supermarket robber, Cioccolatino. Marino grapples with maintaining dignity amidst mounting debt and moral dilemmas. As he navigates this treacherous path, his inner struggle reflects the complexities of love, responsibility, and survival.
